topic: Prepositions Part 1 — Place & Time (In, On, At, Under, Over, Between, Among)

exercises.audioScript: He is standing at the door.
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: This book is between mine and yours.
We travel in summer.
The cat is under the table.
He is standing at the door.
exercises.answer: He is standing at the door.

exercises.audioScript: The book is on the shelf.
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: This competition is among three teams.
His wedding is on Friday.
We are in the room.
The book is on the shelf.
exercises.answer: The book is on the shelf.

exercises.audioScript: The children are playing in the garden.
exercises.hindiScript: बच्चे बगीचे में खेल रहे हैं।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: We live in Delhi.
The bridge is over the river.
I will come at 5 pm.
The children are playing in the garden.
exercises.answer: The children are playing in the garden.

exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: He is standing at the door.
He is sitting between two friends.
My birthday is in January.
My meeting is at 10 am.

exercises.hindiScript: हम गर्मियों में यात्रा करते हैं।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: The book is on the shelf.
This book is very popular among all students.
The meeting is on Monday.
We travel in summer.

exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: The children are playing in the garden.
I work in the office.
The lamp is over the table.
His wedding is on Friday.

exercises.audioScript: The bridge is over the river.
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: My meeting is at 10 am.
The book is on the table.
This book is between mine and yours.
The bridge is over the river.
exercises.answer: The bridge is over the river.

exercises.audioScript: He is sitting between two friends.
exercises.hindiScript: वह दो दोस्तों के बीच बैठा है।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: We travel in summer.
The cat is under the table.
This competition is among three teams.
He is sitting between two friends.
exercises.answer: He is sitting between two friends.

dictationPassage.text: He is standing at the door. The book is on the shelf. The children are playing in the garden. My meeting is at 10 am. We travel in summer.
dictationPassage.hindiTranslation: वह दरवाज़े पर खड़ा है। किताब shelf पर है। बच्चे बगीचे में खेल रहे हैं। मेरी मीटिंग 10 बजे सुबह है। हम गर्मियों में यात्रा करते हैं।
